title: Receive
subtitle: Share your address to receive supported assets on each network.

evm.title: EVM
evm.subtitle: Ethereum, BSC, Polygon
evm.helper: Same address for Ethereum, BSC and Polygon. The sender chooses which network to use.

inactive.title: Account not activated
inactive.body: Receive at least 1 XRP to activate this account on the XRP Ledger. Until then, the address is reserved on the network but not yet stored.

activation.title: What does activation mean?
activation.body:
On the XRP Ledger, an address only exists once it holds at least 1 XRP — this is called the base reserve. The reserve isn't a fee; it stays on the address and can be reclaimed when the account is deleted.

Until you receive that first 1 XRP, the address is yours to share, but the network won't show it in the ledger. Once a payment lands, the account is activated automatically.

qr.destinationTagHint: Sub-account active — destination tag {{tag}} included in QR.

subAccount.title: Create a sub-account
subAccount.body: Generate a destination tag so an exchange can credit incoming payments to a specific user.
